contracts.label: Quaternius-derived game-ready fighter validation contract
requiredChecks: typed Aura model asset entry generated by assets add
bounds with grounded pivot and fighter-scale dimensions
forward-facing +z or z orientation before runtime mirroring
humanoid skeleton metadata suitable for retarget diagnostics
readable visible materials and texture budget
no floating hair-only assembly without a body/head anchor
contracts.evidenceBoundary: This CLI contract is source-only. It does not prove a Quaternius fighter passed validation until assets validate-game output and retained runtime/browser evidence are archived.

messages: Humanoid signals detected from skinned joints.
No orientation metadata detected; facing direction cannot be proven.

warnings: orientation metadata missing; facing direction cannot be validated until GLTF extras declare aura3d.orientation.forwardAxis
